title: Odontosoria afra

intro: Odontosoria afra, also known as African lady fern or African lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Odontosoria afra include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Odontosoria afra is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of tinctures and dried extracts, to harness its medicinal benefits.
